gates.criterion: Exactly one topic resolved and one playbook read; no multi-route loading.
gates.evidence: Named topic + the single references/*.md path used.

gates.criterion: Every collection AND subcollection has an explicit rule; deny-by-default confirmed; immutable fields asserted across resource.data / request.resource.data.
Any list rule is satisfiable by the real client query (rules do not filter results).
gates.evidence: The query constraint that satisfies the list rule.

gates.criterion: Every compound/ordered query has a composite index in firestore.indexes.json.
Every Cloud Function trigger handler is idempotent (at-least-once safe) with a processed-marker.
Rules tested in emulator (allow AND deny); deploy uses dry-run / preview channel before prod.
No price quoted anywhere; cost given as FTE-months / usage estimate with a disclaimer.
gates.evidence: Cost table in usage units + [SUPUESTO] disclaimer.

gates.criterion: No AWS/Azure/multi-cloud, no Docker/K8s, no SQL-normalized Firestore schema; single brand; no client PII.
Every claim carries an evidence tag (EXPLICIT/CONFIG/INFERENCE/SUPUESTO).
